locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage your saved locations for weather
locations.pickHint: Move the map or tap to choose a location

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: We respect your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our weather app.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.location: Location data: We use your device location to show weather for your area. You can disable this in your device settings.
dataCollection.usage: Usage data: We may collect anonymous usage statistics to improve the app (e.g., which features you use).

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUse.content: We use your data only to provide weather forecasts, save your preferred locations, and improve the app experience. We do not sell your personal information.

dataSharing.title: Sharing Your Data
dataSharing.content: We may share anonymized or aggregated data with weather data providers. We do not share personally identifiable information with third parties for marketing.

security.title: Security
security.content: We take reasonable measures to protect your data. Location and preferences are stored on your device; we do not store your location history on our servers.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.content: You can delete saved locations and clear app data at any time. If you have questions about your data, contact us using the details below.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related questions or requests, please contact us at privacy@weatherapp.example.com.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Manage weather alerts and notification preferences
notifications.description: Receive alerts for severe weather, rain, and daily forecasts for your saved locations.
